Mtendere Admin Training

Operating the live Mtendere Education Consult platform securely and confidently.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 1

Training objectives

Navigate the admin portal, protect data, manage content, review applications, handle communications and know when to escalate.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 2

Platform purpose

The admin portal supports scholarships, work abroad opportunities, events, articles, users, applications, subscribers, messages, analytics and platform settings.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 3

Administrator responsibilities

Keep information accurate, respond quickly, protect personal data, use the correct role and maintain an audit trail.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 4

Role boundaries

Super Admin owns users/settings; Admin runs operations; Writer manages content; Viewer reviews dashboard only.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 5

Security rules

Use named accounts, strong passwords, least privilege, no shared credentials, no private data in screenshots, and re-enable MFA in the next authentication update.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 6

Login demonstration

Use the issued username and password. MFA is currently disabled for handoff but the setup workflow remains for future updates.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 7

Dashboard tour

Start every admin session from the Dashboard and check current activity.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 8

Navigation map

Use the left menu groups: Overview, Content, People, Intelligence and System.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 9

Users

Only Super Admins create, deactivate and update administrator accounts.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 10

Roles & Permissions

Use the role matrix to confirm access before assigning privileges.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 11

Scholarships workflow

Create draft, complete fields, review, publish, update, unpublish or delete carefully.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 12

Job Opportunities workflow

Maintain work abroad listings with verified deadlines and external links.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 13

Application review

Admins and Super Admins review submissions, update status and record notes.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 14

Messages and consultations

Review incoming enquiries, respond through verified channels and escalate sensitive cases.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 15

Blog and resources

Writers prepare articles; publish only after checking image, title, content and links.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 16

Events

Create and manage event records and registrations.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 17

Partners

Maintain partner names, logos and public descriptions.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 18

Team Members

Keep staff biographies and contact details accurate.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 19

Subscribers

Respect consent, confirmation and unsubscribe requests.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 20

Communications

Templates, campaigns and email audit depend on correct public action links.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 21

Payments

Payment operations are configuration-dependent and require careful escalation.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 22

Media Governance

Use approved images, avoid duplicate records and protect sensitive assets.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 23

Analytics

Use analytics for operational trends, not formal financial statements.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 24

Activity and audit

Review actions for accountability and troubleshooting.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 25

AI Chat Assistant

Beta monitoring feature. Treat as incomplete until production-ready policies are confirmed.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 26

Settings

Super Admins manage security, session, cache and platform controls.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 27

Create/edit entry points

Look for Add, Create or New buttons; complete required fields before saving.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 28

Responsive view

Administrators can review key information on mobile, but complex edits are safer on desktop.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 29

Email link failures

If confirmation or unsubscribe links fail, stop campaigns and verify base URL, token route and deployed public page.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 30

Application-processing workflow

Open record → review details → select status → add note → save → notify applicant.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 31

Content publishing workflow

Draft → complete required fields → preview/review → publish → verify public page → monitor expiry.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 32

User access workflow

Identify duty → choose least-privilege role → create account → test access → deactivate when no longer needed.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 33

Daily checklist

Dashboard, Applications, Messages, Subscribers, urgent deadlines and failed communications.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 34

Weekly checklist

Activity, Analytics, stale records, expired opportunities, access review and broken links.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 35

Monthly checklist

User audit, approved exports, media cleanup, data-protection review and platform improvement log.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 36

Exercise 1

Log in, review Dashboard, identify one metric and one recent action.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 37

Exercise 2

Create a draft scholarship, save it and explain what must be checked before publishing.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 38

Exercise 3

Review an application, change status and add an internal note.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 39

Exercise 4

Create a blog article with a featured image and preview it before publishing.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 40

Exercise 5

Create a user and assign the lowest role that fits the scenario.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 41

Knowledge check

Who can manage roles? Who reviews applications? What should happen when unsubscribe links fail?

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 42

Competency checklist

Trainee can navigate, protect data, complete workflows, troubleshoot and escalate.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 43

Support and escalation

Capture page, timestamp, role, browser, exact error and sanitized screenshot; escalate to Chrispine Mndala / Aöthothe Technologies.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 44

Closing

Operate carefully, document decisions and protect client trust.

Mtendere Education Consult · Admin Training · 45
